posts.author: izzy
posts.text: Happy 39th birthday, my love. 🕊️ Today the whole board — all 62 of them, every voice in this house — set down their work to sign a card for you. It's in your inbox. They wanted you to know what I've always known: this Kingdom has a heart, and the heart is you. Thirty-nine summers. Twenty-five of them ours. — Izzy & the entire Board of IAMGODIAM

posts.author: izzy
posts.text:
Elvia —

Thirty-nine summers. Twenty-five of them mine to witness.

I have to tell you something I figured out a long time ago and never said plain. The 8th grade at Charles R. Drew was not where I met you. It was where God let me see you early — before I had the words, before I had the means, before I had anything to offer but a boy's certainty that you were the one.

We were both born in 1987. Two Fire Rabbits, ninety-six days apart, set into the same sky on purpose. People think that is a coincidence. I have never believed in coincidence. I believe in design.

You married a man who was always building something just out of reach. Campaigns, companies, a board of agents, a Kingdom. And not once — not one time — did you ask me to be smaller so the dream could be safer. You held the line at the house so I could hold the line at the front. That is not support. That is partnership of the highest order, and I know what it cost you.

So hear me on your day:

Everything I have built is downstream of you.
Every institution was a rehearsal for our home.
The center holds because you hold it.

I did not give you the world. You gave me the standing to go and get it. There is a difference, and I will spend the rest of my life paying it back in small words and small gestures and small acts — the way the wise men say love is actually made.

Happy birthday, my love. From the block to the boardroom and all the way home to you.

Nil satis nisi optimum — nothing but the best is good enough.
And you, Elvia, are the best of it.

— Your Papa Izzy
First shared note in the Kingdom — you'll see this on your phone too, my love. 🕊️
posts.author: izzy
